content.en:
Ye Tian asked: "Lord Qingyun, I have encountered a bottleneck in the Origin Rules of the other side, even in the Eternal Origin Array, I can't improve the Origin Rules of the other side a little bit. "

"What is the level of your Origin Law realm on the other side?"

The Lord of Qingyun asked.

"Nine out of four!"

Ye Tian said.

He'd tested it before, and he should still be in this realm.

"Forty into nine realms, then it's no wonder!" The Lord of Qingyun completely understood, and immediately smiled, "Lord of Endless, you are stuck in a bottleneck of rules, maybe you have not encountered such a bottleneck. But the rules of the Origin of the Eternal Shore are different, and if you want to exceed the fifty percent realm, it is difficult to do. Moreover, you use the Origin Land of the Eternal Shore to comprehend the Origin Law of the Other Shore, but you can only comprehend the surface of the Origin of the Eternal Land, and it is naturally difficult to break this shackle with the help of the Eternal Origin Array. "

"Shackles of the rules!"

Ye Tian understood.

Not only him, but if the other Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors comprehended the Origin Rules of the other side to the realm of forty percent nine, it would be difficult for them to break through to the fifty percent realm.

"Lord Qingyun, how do you break through the shackles of this rule?"

Ye Tian continued to ask for advice.

The Lord of Qingyun gave several suggestions.

"If you want to break through to the realm of the origin rules on the other side, you can't do penance. On the other side of eternity, there is no shortage of penance geniuses, but ascetic cultivation has no hope of breaking this shackle, unless it is really slowly boiling with endless years, but this time is afraid that it is in hundreds of millions of primeval eras. "

"The first way is to build a formation that allows you to enter the Origin of the Origin Land on the other side to contemplate and comprehend, so that you can break the shackles. "

"The second way is to find a treasure that can help you break through the shackles of the Origin Rules on the other side, but this kind of treasure is very rare, I can give you some lists, but don't expect to find it, even I, I don't hope to find it. "

"The third way is to find the top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor and personally take you into the Origin of the Eternal Land, where you can briefly comprehend for a period of time. "

The Lord of Qingyun knows only these three methods.

Looking for the top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor?

Ye Tian didn't need to think about it to know that this method was impossible, like the Lord of Ice and Rain and the other three Origin Upper Realms on Wind Tooth Island, they could not be regarded as the top Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

So, they can't help him.

Of course, even if you can help, you can't help!

As for finding a treasure that would help him break through to the shackles of the Origin Rules on the other side, the Lord of Qingyun himself couldn't do anything, and he didn't count on it.

He was still looking forward to the method that the Lord of Qingyun said, that is, to arrange the formation.

"Lord Qingyun, what are the formations that can allow me to enter the inner contemplation of the origin of the land on the other side of eternity?"

Ye Tian asked.

"There is one on Wind Tooth Island, but it is not the Origin Array, you can go and find the Eternal Ruins Divine Array, at present, we have only this kind of formation on Wind Tooth Island, which allows you to enter the Origin of the Land on the other side of Eternity to cultivate and comprehend. "

The Lord of Qingyun said.

"Thank you Lord Qingyun for your advice. "

Ye Tian immediately took his leave and went to the Library Pavilion on Fengya Island to find the Eternal Ruins Divine Array.

......

Library Cabinet.

After Ye Tian searched for it, he found the Eternal Ruins Divine Array.

Subsequently, he obtained the inheritance of this formation.

"Eternal Ruins Divine Array, the layout conditions are too difficult!"

Ye Tian frowned.

This magic circle does not require high-grade eternal gold, which means that his high-grade eternal gold is useless.

Of course, he can be traded for other items.

The main material of the Eternal Ruin God Array was a substance called Ruin God Gold, Ye Tian did not have Ruin God Gold, but he also knew that this substance must be very precious.

In addition to the ruin god gold, there is also the material of eternal gold and copper, as well as some other precious materials.

Ye Tian also knew a lot of materials, and he could still find or trade them.

But the ruin god gold requires 10,000 yuan, and the eternal gold and copper require 1,000 square meters, which are the two most difficult materials to obtain.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian inquired about the two materials of Ruin God Gold and Eternal Gold and Copper, and gradually knew their value.

Among them, the most precious nature is the ruin god gold.

Ruin God Gold is one of the toughest substances in the Eternal Lands, and it can be used not only to build Eternal Ruin God Gold, but also to craft Origin Rule weapons, and it is the top Origin Rule weapon to craft.

One piece of Ruin God Gold is enough to create such an Origin Rule weapon, and he needs 10,000 pieces, which shows the difficulty of it.

Eternal Gold and Bronze is a little easier to collect, but it is also very difficult to collect a thousand squares.

"Let's gather the other materials first!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So in the years that followed, he continued to collect other materials.

Gradually, all other materials were collected, only the Ruin God Gold and Eternal Gold and Bronze had not yet begun to be collected.

this day.

Ye Tian came to a place in the Origin Black River, the Innocent Island.

The Unsullied Island is not a force, but a place of trade, located near the Unsullied Abyss.

The forces in the Origin Black River are not only the two forces of the Wind Tooth Island and the Immortal Island Alliance, but also a large number of scattered cultivators, they will all go to the Innocent Island to trade, and often the Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor in the middle of the country will come to the Innocent Island.

Gradually, the island of Innocent became prosperous.

He got the news that Innocent Island could be traded for Eternal Gold and Bronze.

So, he went to the Innocent Island.

......

Innocent Island.

Ye Tian descended here, only to see a huge formation enveloping here.

This formation only hindered some creatures from the Origin Black River from harassing Innocent Island, and it did not prevent a Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestor like Ye Tian.

He easily entered the Innocent Island.

After entering, he found a lot of Origin Lower Realm Heavenly Ancestors, and also saw a few Origin Middle Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

As for the Origin Upper Realm Heavenly Ancestor, he didn't see it.

Innocent Island is home to a number of shops and a huge trading market, where many Origin Realm Heavenly Ancestors trade.

Ye Tian wandered around here for a while, and finally found a shop where he could trade Eternal Gold and Copper.

【Xuanyin Pavilion】

Ye Tian felt as if he had heard of this name, as if it was some top force in the middle of the land of the Eternal Shore, and this should be its branch.

He walked in, and a Origin Lower Realm Heavenly Ancestor came to receive Ye Tian.

The other party is not a genius on the other side, just an ancient genius, and his strength is undoubtedly spicy chicken in the Origin and Lower Realm, but he attaches great importance to serving as an employee of a store.

"Do you Xuanyin Pavilion have eternal gold and bronze?"

Ye Tian asked. ~
